Quality Education.reason: Focus on 'effective communication' and 'team collaboration' supports Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development').

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops '創新能力' (innovation ability) and '溝通能力' (communication ability) for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 核心能力分析圖 Core Competence Analysis Chart

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Prepares students for creative jobs (Target 8.3) by having them '體驗業界的創意協作模式' (experience the industry's creative collaboration model) and providing industry lectures.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on developing '創新能力' (innovation ability) and '創新思維' (innovative thinking) for the creative industries, supporting innovation and industrial capabilities (Targets 9.5, 9.b).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Promotes responsible practices by requiring students to '維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍' (Respect Copyright), a link to sustainable practices under Target 12.6.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Links to rule of law (Target 16.3) through the requirement to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright). The mention of '和平紀念日' (Peace Memorial Day) is incidental.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Emphasizes '小組協作' (group collaboration) and '團隊合作與互動學習' (Teamwork and interactive learning), reflecting the partnership principles of Target 17.17 within an educational context.

Partnerships for the Goals.reasoning: The course strongly emphasizes 'group collaboration,' 'teacher-student brainstorming,' and 'teamwork and interactive learning,' directly reflecting the principles of effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
